sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Barrick Mining slows development at Reko Diq in Pakistan amid security concerns
feed.summary: Barrick Mining Corp. is slowing down development at its Reko Diq project in Pakistan due to escalating security concerns and incidents in the region. The company previously announced a review in February and expects this pause to continue until mid-2027. This delay could lead to significant increases in the previously estimated capital budget for the project's two phases, which were initially set between US$5.6 billion and US$6.0 billion for Phase 1 and US$3.3 billion and US$3.6 billion for Phase 2, with first production originally targeted for late 2028.

feed.title: Tapestry appoints Pinterest CTO Matt Madrigal to board By Investing.com
feed.summary: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE:TPR) has appointed Matt Madrigal, Chief Technology Officer of Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE:PINS), to its Board of Directors, bringing the board membership to eleven. Madrigal's expertise in technology and scaling global consumer platforms is expected to support Tapestry's growth agenda, which includes brands like Coach and kate spade new york. The article also notes recent financial updates for Pinterest, including a revised EBITDA forecast and a significant convertible note investment from Elliott Investment Management.

feed.title: Brink’s expands credit facility to $3.85 billion for Atleos deal By Investing.com
feed.summary: The Brink's Company has expanded its credit facility to $3.85 billion, including a delayed draw term loan and increased revolving credit, to partially fund its planned acquisition of NCR Atleos Corporation and for general corporate purposes. This financial move, maturing in March 2031, reflects continued lender confidence in Brink's outlook. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, with liquid assets exceeding short-term obligations, and the acquisition awaits regulatory and shareholder approvals.

feed.title: Elevance (ELV) Shares Surge 6% Following Medicare Payment Update
feed.summary: Elevance (ELV) shares rose 6% after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) finalized the 2027 Medicare payment rates, signaling investor confidence. Elevance Health Inc, a major U.S. health insurer with a $66.47 billion market cap, holds a significant presence in government-sponsored programs. Despite a recent earnings decline, its financial health remains stable with attractive valuation metrics suggesting potential undervaluation.

feed.title: UnitedHealth (NYSE: UNH) director receives 206 deferred stock units
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group director Michele J. Hooper received a grant of 206 deferred stock units on April 1, 2026, as part of her regular quarterly compensation for Board service. These units are immediately vested but must be held until her Board service concludes, increasing her direct holdings to 41,792 shares/units. This transaction is a routine compensation-related equity award, not an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) director receives 320 deferred stock units
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group director Kristen Gil has received 320 deferred stock units as regular quarterly compensation for her Board service. These units are immediately vested but must be held until her service ends. Following this grant, Gil directly holds 2,403 shares and indirectly holds 3,800 shares through a trust.

feed.title: UnitedHealth (NYSE: UNH) director Paul Garcia receives quarterly stock awards
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group director Paul R. Garcia received routine quarterly equity compensation awards on April 1, 2026, consisting of 206 deferred stock units and 137 shares of common stock for his Board service. The deferred stock units vested immediately but must be held until he completes his Board tenure. Following these grants, Garcia directly holds 3,673 UnitedHealth Group common shares, with additional indirect holdings through various trusts.

feed.title: AIG sets April 30 earnings release, opens May 1 webcast to public
feed.summary: American International Group, Inc. (AIG) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on April 30, 2026. Following the release, AIG will host a public conference call and live webcast on May 1, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results. The financial details and webcast access will be available on the Investors section of AIG's website.

feed.title: Republic Services digging at Missoula’s landfill along I-90
feed.summary: Republic Services is currently digging a trench at its Missoula landfill along Interstate 90. This work involves relocating a long-standing natural gas pipeline that is operated by a utility provider within an undeveloped area of the landfill. The project has attracted public attention due to its visibility from I-90 near mile marker 101.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ: ON) director gets 168-share stock retainer
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor director Paul Anthony Mascarenas received a grant of 168 fully-vested common shares as part of his compensation. These shares, valued at $62.19 each, were issued in lieu of a portion of his first-quarter 2026 cash retainers, based on his prior election. Following this transaction, Mascarenas directly holds 55,488 common shares in the company.

feed.title: CVS, UnitedHealth, Humana, Elevance Shares Surge: Here's Why
feed.summary: Shares of several major health insurers, including CVS, UnitedHealth, Humana, and Elevance, saw significant after-hours gains on Monday. This surge followed the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) finalizing payment policies for 2027, projecting a net average increase of 2.48% for Medicare Advantage (MA) and Part D plans. The CMS stated that these updates aim to keep coverage affordable and ensure value for patients.

feed.title: Franklin Resources reports $1.68 trillion AUM at March quarter-end
feed.summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE: BEN) reported preliminary assets under management (AUM) of $1.68 trillion at March 31, 2026, a decrease from $1.73 trillion at the end of February 2026 due to negative market impacts, though partially offset by long-term net inflows. Despite overall outflows from Western Asset Management, the company experienced $17 billion in preliminary long-term net inflows for the quarter. The report detailed AUM breakdown by asset class, with equities and fixed income seeing declines, while alternative investments and cash management increased.

feed.title: [Form 4] Bitfarms Ltd Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Philip Fanny, a director at Keel Infrastructure Corp. (formerly Bitfarms Ltd.), reported the acquisition of 101,010 restricted stock units (RSUs) through a Form 4 filing. These RSUs, granted at no cash cost, will vest on April 2, 2027, aligning Fanny's equity-based incentive with the company's future performance. Following this transaction, Fanny directly holds 101,010 RSUs.

feed.title: Markets cut Franklin Templeton assets to $1.68T despite $5B inflows
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton's preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) decreased to $1.68 trillion in March 2026 from $1.73 trillion in February, primarily due to market impact. Despite the overall decline, the firm reported long-term net inflows of $5 billion for the month, and $17 billion for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, excluding Western Asset Management. The report provides detailed AUM figures across various asset classes, highlighting both growth in cash management and alternative assets, and market-driven declines in equity and fixed income.

feed.title: FWD Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:FWD
feed.summary: The AB Disruptors ETF (FWD) is an actively managed fund that seeks capital growth by investing in companies globally that are at the forefront of innovative growth trends and are considered market disrupters. The fund, issued by Equitable Holdings, Inc., has assets under management of $1.64 billion and an expense ratio of 0.65%. It focuses on stocks, with potential heavy weighting in the Information Technology sector, and pays dividends with a yield of 0.10%.

feed.title: [ARS] AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces that AVALONBAY COMMUNITIES INC (AVB) has submitted an ARS filing to the SEC. The filing, dated April 6, 2026, has a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article provides details about the company, including its market cap, industry, and recent news and SEC filings.

feed.title: Sysco’s World Cup-themed food show is a preview of how Houston plans to feed the world
feed.summary: Houston is preparing for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, which is expected to bring a $1.5 billion economic boost to the city, particularly benefiting local restaurants. Sysco Houston is hosting a World Cup-themed Food Show on April 8, connecting over 150 suppliers with more than 500 restaurant operators. This event aims to help local food businesses explore global flavors, develop themed menus, and prepare for the high volume of international visitors during the seven matches Houston will host.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial: I Was Right To Rotate Two Years Ago (NYSE:AMP)
feed.summary: The article evaluates Ameriprise Financial (AMP), maintaining a 'HOLD' rating with a $380/share price target due to current valuation and market dynamics. Despite strong fundamentals, robust capital returns, and high advisor productivity, AMP faces headwinds from interest rate sensitivity and the shift from active asset management to passive ETFs, which pressures margins. Although the stock trades below its historical P/E average, growth normalization and fee compression limit its near-term upside.

feed.title: Moderna (MRNA) CFO vests RSUs, 703 shares withheld for tax
feed.summary: Moderna's CFO, James M. Mock, reported a routine equity compensation activity where 1,453 restricted stock units converted into common shares on April 2, 2026. To cover tax withholding obligations, 703 common shares were withheld at $50.03 per share, rather than being sold. As a result, Mock's direct holdings of common shares increased to 57,748, in addition to 2,906 restricted stock units.

feed.title: News | New York at risk for losing more business, JPMorgan CEO says
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon warns that New York is at risk of losing more businesses and jobs due to high taxes and rising costs, which erode its competitiveness. Dimon highlighted a trend of companies, including JPMorgan itself, shifting job growth away from the city to states with lower tax burdens and living costs. This warning comes as several states consider new tax measures targeting high earners and New York's mayor proposes tax hikes to close a budget gap.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Shares Hit 52-Week Low Amid Geopolitical Tensions
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) stock has fallen to a new 52-week low due to escalating geopolitical tensions between the U.S. and Iran, which are impacting the global travel industry. Despite this, analysts maintain a bullish long-term outlook, citing the company's recent 25-for-1 stock split, diversified global business, high gross margins, and attractive dividend yield. They recommend long-term investors consider buying the dip, as Booking Holdings is well-positioned for future travel industry growth once geopolitical pressures subside.

feed.title: Carrier Global Corp. stock: What investors need to know about its HVAC dominance now
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corp. is a leader in HVAC solutions, well-positioned for growth due to increasing demand for energy-efficient buildings, global urbanization, and stricter energy regulations. The company's diversified business segments, strong market position, and strategic acquisitions align with megatrends like electrification and sustainability, making it a compelling long-term investment in climate tech. Investors should consider its foundational role in smart climate solutions and its potential for steady growth through aftermarket services and innovation.

feed.title: Fortinet Issues Emergency Patch for FortiClient Zero-Day
feed.summary: Fortinet has released an emergency patch for a critical zero-day vulnerability (CVE-2026-35616) in its FortiClient Endpoint Management Server (EMS) software, which is actively being exploited in the wild. The flaw, with a CVSS score of 9.1, allows unauthenticated attackers to execute code through crafted requests. This incident is the latest in a series of Fortinet vulnerabilities targeted by threat actors, highlighting the urgent need for customers to apply the hotfix.

feed.title: Newmont Corp stock: What you need to know for smart investing now
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth guide for investors on Newmont Corp, the world's largest gold miner. It details the company's business, strategic acquisitions, financial strength, and market performance, highlighting its role as a stable asset and a hedge against inflation. The piece also covers analyst views, institutional interest, and potential risks, advising investors to align Newmont with their long-term portfolio goals.

feed.title: Healthcare, Financials ETFs Get A Mega-Cap Reset With TRUF, TRUH
feed.summary: VanEck has launched two new TruSector ETFs, TRUF (Financials) and TRUH (Healthcare), designed to provide more precise and less diluted exposure to mega-cap leaders within their respective sectors. These ETFs aim to address the diversification constraints of traditional sector ETFs under RIC rules, allowing for meaningful allocations to dominant companies. Both funds feature a competitive expense ratio of 0.10% and maintain compliance while striving for cleaner sector representation and reduced tracking error.

feed.title: [Form 4] MID AMERICA APARTMENT COMMUNITIES INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: MID AMERICA APARTMENT COMMUNITIES President and CEO H. Eric Bolton Jr. reported insider trading activity involving a stock-based compensation event. He received a grant of 12,231 shares, while 5,705 shares were disposed of to cover taxes related to a prior-year restricted stock plan. This resulted in a net increase of 6,526 shares, bringing his directly owned holdings to 328,468.3947 shares, with an additional 10,476.8659 shares held indirectly in an ESOP Trust.

feed.title: UBS (AMUB) launches Trigger Autocallable Notes linked to Blackstone Inc.
feed.summary: UBS AG has launched Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Blackstone Inc. common stock, maturing around April 8, 2027. These notes offer periodic contingent coupons if the underlying stock meets specific barriers and are automatically called under certain conditions. Investors face principal loss if the notes are not called and the final level of Blackstone stock drops below a downside threshold, as payment depends on UBS's creditworthiness and the underlying asset's performance.

feed.title: SMCI Investor Alert: Super Micro Computer Securities Fraud
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert regarding a securities class action lawsuit against Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI). The lawsuit names CEO Charles Liang and CFO David Weigand as individual defendants, alleging they enabled an illegal scheme to export AI servers to China, leading to a 33.3% stock decline after the DOJ unsealed an indictment. Investors who suffered losses during the Class Period (April 30, 2024, through March 19, 2026) are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially lead the class action by May 25, 2026.

feed.title: Home Depot (NYSE: HD) EVP shares withheld to cover tax obligations
feed.summary: Home Depot's EVP of Merchandising, William D. Bastek, reported a routine tax-related disposition of 2,972 shares of common stock on April 3, 2026. These shares, valued at $321.63 each, were withheld to satisfy tax obligations on equity compensation, not through an open-market sale. Following this transaction, Bastek directly owns 25,223.9518 shares of Home Depot common stock.

feed.title: Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) offers Class B→B‑3/C exchange with uncapped makewhole terms
feed.summary: Visa Inc. is offering an exchange program for holders of its Class B common stock (B-1 and B-2) to convert them into newly issued Class B-3 and Class C common stock, along with cash for fractional interests. The exchange requires participants to sign a Makewhole Agreement, which entails uncapped payment obligations tied to future adjustments in the Applicable Conversion Rates related to ongoing U.S. covered litigation. If fully subscribed, this offer could lead to the issuance of approximately 61.38 million Class B-3 shares and 24.07 million Class C shares.

feed.title: A Look At RTX (RTX) Valuation As Long Term Returns Contrast With Richer P/E Multiple
feed.summary: RTX (RTX) has seen mixed share performance recently, with strong long-term returns but a weaker short-term trend. Despite being considered 9.7% undervalued by analysts with a fair value of $217.21 per share, its current P/E of 39.2x is richer than the industry average, suggesting its future growth might already be priced in. The company boasts a robust backlog of $236 billion, indicating strong future revenue growth potential in defense and commercial aerospace, but faces risks like jet engine reliability issues and potential budget shifts.

feed.title: A Look At PPG Industries (PPG) Valuation After Recent Analyst Downgrades
feed.summary: Recent analyst downgrades by firms like Citigroup and UBS have shifted focus to PPG Industries' valuation. Despite recent declines in short-term share price performance, PPG's stock is considered 32.4% undervalued by Simply Wall St's narrative, with a fair value of $152.76 against a current price of $103.24. This assessment is based on the company's earnings, revenue trajectories, and profit margins, noting potential risks from divestitures or weakened demand in key sectors.

feed.title: UBS Declares Coupon Payments on 12 ETRACS Exchange Traded Notes
feed.summary: UBS Investment Bank has announced coupon payments for 12 ETRACS Exchange Traded Notes (ETNs), including 9 traded on NYSE Arca and 3 expected for NASDAQ. The announcement details the coupon valuation dates, ex-dates, record dates, payment dates, coupon amounts, payment schedules, and current annualized yields for each of the specified ETNs. Investors are cautioned that coupon payments are variable and not guaranteed, and future payments may differ significantly from current yields.

feed.title: INVESCO Ltd. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of INVESCO Ltd. (IVZ) declined by 5.22% on Monday, closing at $22.88, despite an overall positive trading day for the broader market. Both the S&P 500 Index and the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw gains. This marks the second consecutive day of losses for INVESCO's stock.

feed.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. stock falls Monday, underperforms market
feed.summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (AQN) stock fell 0.23% to C$8.63 on Monday, underperforming the S&P/TSX Composite Index which rose 0.22%. The company's shares closed 10.9% below their 52-week high of C$9.69, achieved on February 27th. This movement occurred during an otherwise positive trading session for the Canadian market.

feed.title: Pinnacle West to discuss Q1 results at May 4 webcast, noon ET
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital Corp. (NYSE: PNW) has announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026, before the U.S. financial markets open. The company's management will host a live webcast and conference call at noon ET on the same day to discuss the results and recent developments. The webcast will be accessible via pinnaclewest.com/presentations, and an audio replay will also be available for a limited time.

feed.title: Ascendis Pharma’s YUVIWEL gains orphan drug exclusivity in U.S.
feed.summary: Ascendis Pharma's YUVIWEL has received orphan drug exclusivity from the U.S. FDA and is now commercially available for children with achondroplasia. The drug, approved on February 27, 2026, benefits from marketing exclusivity until February 27, 2033, along with other incentives for rare disease treatments. Ascendis Pharma is experiencing strong financial growth, with a significant revenue increase and stock surge, and analysts anticipate continued sales growth and profitability.

feed.title: Jones Cecilia, Agios Pharmaceuticals CFO, sells $109k in stock
feed.summary: Agios Pharmaceuticals CFO, Cecilia Jones, sold 3,141 shares of common stock worth $109,024 to cover tax obligations related to vested performance share units. The sale was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale, Jones exercised options for 8,500 shares and still directly owns 54,998 shares, as the company stock has gained nearly 19% recently and is considered undervalued.

feed.title: [Form 4] MID AMERICA APARTMENT COMMUNITIES INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Joseph Fracchia, EVP, Chief Tech & Innovation Officer of MID AMERICA APARTMENT COMMUNITIES INC. (MAA), reported routine equity compensation activity. On April 1, 2026, he acquired 1,632 shares as a grant and simultaneously disposed of 272 shares at $122.55 each to cover tax liabilities associated with a restricted stock plan. Following these transactions, Fracchia directly holds 13,018.9243 shares of common stock.

feed.title: [8-K] Howmet Aerospace Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM) filed an 8-K report announcing the availability of its 2025 Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Report on its website. This report details the company’s commitment and performance regarding ESG matters. The filing falls under Regulation FD Disclosure and indicates that the report is not considered "filed" for Section 18 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 purposes.

feed.title: Public Storage Completes $500 Million 5.000% Senior Notes Due 2035 Offering
feed.summary: Public Storage, through its subsidiary Public Storage Operating Company, successfully completed a $500 million offering of 5.000% senior notes due 2035. The notes are guaranteed by Public Storage, with interest payable semiannually starting June 15, 2026, and they will mature on December 15, 2035. This offering aims to raise long-term capital at a fixed interest rate for the company.

feed.title: MAA (MAA) EVP Adrian Hill receives 10,907-share grant with tax withholding
feed.summary: Adrian Hill, Executive Vice President and Chief Investment Officer of Mid America Apartment Communities (MAA), received a routine equity grant of 10,907 shares on April 1, 2026. To cover taxes related to a prior-year restricted stock plan, 1,612 shares were withheld at a price of $122.55 per share. Following these transactions, Hill directly holds 64,432.647 shares and indirectly holds 1,030 shares through a family trust.

feed.title: Brian Foley joins American Integrity (NYSE: AII) as new CFO
feed.summary: American Integrity Insurance Group, Inc. (NYSE: AII) has appointed Brian Foley as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 6, 2026. Foley, who previously worked at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, will receive an annual base salary of $600,000, eligibility for an annual cash bonus of up to $400,000, and long-term equity awards. Former CFO Ben Lurie will transition to a consulting role, earning an annual fee of $300,000 and potentially an $800,000 IPO success bonus, while retaining some board and committee roles.

feed.title: [144] Ulta Beauty, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This SEC filing is a Form 144 for Ulta Beauty, Inc. (ULTA), indicating a proposed sale of securities. The document details the type of securities (Common Stock), the number of shares to be sold (452), their aggregate market value, and the acquisition date and nature of the acquisition (stock award for compensation). This type of filing is used for notice of proposed sales of restricted and control securities.

feed.title: Medicare Finalizes 2.48% Rate Hike for Private Insurers in 2027
feed.summary: The US Medicare program has finalized a 2.48% rate increase for private insurers in 2027, marking a significant improvement over the initial rates proposed earlier by the agency. This decision from the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services is expected to influence how over half a trillion dollars are distributed among private health plans offered by major companies like UnitedHealth Group, Humana Inc., and CVS Health Corp. The news led to a climb in stock for companies like Humana and CVS.

feed.title: COO of Bed Bath & Beyond (NASDAQ: BBBY) receives 14,160-share award
feed.summary: Bed Bath & Beyond's Chief Operating Officer, Lisa Foley Dubois, was awarded 14,160 shares of common stock at a price of $0.00 per share. This was a result of a merger with The Brand House Collective, Inc., converting her previously held TBHC common shares and restricted share units into Bed Bath & Beyond stock at a 0.1993-for-1 exchange ratio. After the transaction, she directly holds 14,160 shares, with some shares withheld for tax purposes.

feed.title: Arhaus (ARHS) officer nets new stock after RSU and dividend rights vest
feed.summary: Kathy E. Veltri, Chief Retail Officer of Arhaus, converted 11,804 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and 610 Dividend Equivalent Rights into 12,414 shares of Class A Common Stock. To cover tax obligations, 4,901 shares were withheld, leaving her with 497,760 Class A shares directly held. These RSUs and Dividend Equivalent Rights vest in three equal annual installments, contingent upon her continuous service to the company.

feed.title: MAA (NYSE: MAA) CFO sells shares to cover restricted stock taxes
feed.summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities (NYSE: MAA) EVP and CFO Aubrey Clay recently reported equity compensation activity and a modest stock sale. On April 1, 2026, Clay received 3,643 shares of common stock, with 237 shares withheld for tax obligations on vested restricted stock. Additionally, on April 6, 2026, he sold 145 shares at $124.73 each under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan to cover further tax liabilities from previous restricted stock vestings, leaving him with 13,679 shares directly held.

feed.title: Anteris Technologies Global (NASDAQ:AVR) Trading Down 5.8% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Anteris Technologies Global (NASDAQ:AVR) experienced a 5.8% drop in its stock price, trading at $5.18 on light volume. Despite weak profitability with a reported ($0.75) EPS and $0.31M revenue, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $15.33. Notably, major shareholder L1 Capital increased its stake significantly in January, indicating insider confidence.

feed.title: Assurant (AIZ) 2026 proxy details pay, equity plan boost and governance votes
feed.summary: Assurant is preparing for its 2026 annual meeting on May 21, where stockholders will vote on electing directors, ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor, approving 2025 executive pay, amending its 2017 long-term equity incentive plan, and considering a stockholder proposal for written consent. The company reported strong 2025 financial performance, including $12.4 billion in net earned premiums and $872.7 million in net income, and highlighted its commitment to strong corporate governance and linking executive compensation to financial performance. A key proposal involves increasing the available share reserve for its equity incentive plan by 480,000 common shares to continue attracting and retaining key talent.
